pr.title: Non-record: sin² activation + causal screening pipeline

output.summary: Use sin² in MLPs and an automated causal screening pipeline to guide periodic activations plus adaptive multi-token prediction and Rho-1 loss masking probes.
techniques: sin² drop-in for relu² to keep non-negative squaring while smoothing gradients
automated causal DAG screening pipeline to prioritize architecture interventions
adaptive multi-token prediction and Rho-1 selective loss masking explorations
